Class Usuario

Namespace
Domain
Assembly
Domain.dll

Domain entity representing an application user.

public class Usuario
Inheritance
object
Usuario
Inherited Members
object.ToString()

object.GetHashCode()
object.GetType()
object.MemberwiseClone()

Remarks

Password is stored as a SHA-256 hex digest (see Service.Helpers.CryptographyHelper.HashPassword). DigitoVerificador is a SHA-256 integrity verifier computed over Id + NombreUsuario + Password + Estado to detect out-of-band record tampering.

Constructors

Usuario()

Initializes a new instance with a freshly generated Id.

public Usuario()

Properties

DigitoVerificador

Integrity verifier computed over core user fields. Recalculated on every update via UsuarioService.UpdateDV().

public string DigitoVerificador { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Estado

true if the account is active; false if disabled.

public bool Estado { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

Id

Unique identifier, auto-generated on construction.

public Guid Id { get; set; }

Property Value

Guid

NombreUsuario

Unique login name.

public string NombreUsuario { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Password

SHA-256 hex digest of the user's password.

public string Password { get; set; }

Property Value

string

Permisos

Permission tree roots assigned to this user (mix of Familia and Patente nodes).

public List<Acceso> Permisos { get; set; }

Property Value

List<Acceso>
